# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

- [ ] Code
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Sample
- [ ] Dashboard/UI
- [ ] Tests

## Checks

- [ ] `dotnet build`
- [ ] `dotnet run --project tests\CodexTeamUp.Tests`
- [ ] Not run, explained below

## Public Hygiene

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, auth files, or local runtime state
- [ ] No private project names
- [ ] No personal absolute paths
- [ ] Public-facing text is English

## Notes

Mention risks, limitations, or follow-up work.
